data.body:
[1st Place on Korea Apple App Store]

Thanks to the support of our Sensei, Blue Archive made first place in the Korea Apple App Store!
Log in now to get the special gift!

- Appreciation Gift: 10-Recruitment Ticket x1
- Claim Period: 7/26 (Wed) 3:00 AM – 8/2 (Wed) 2:59 PM (UTC)

#BlueArchive
